é¡µ=1 bbox=(220,33,155,14) SERVICE AGREEMENT
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,72,332,10) 1. DEFINITIONS. In this Agreement, unless the context otherwise requires:
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,95,366,10)    1.1 "Service" means the software-as-a-service platform provided by the Provider.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,118,342,10)    1.2 "Customer Data" means all data submitted by or on behalf of Customer.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,140,138,10) 2. TERM AND TERMINATION.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,163,380,10)    2.1 This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and continues for 12 months.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,186,265,10)    2.2 Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,208,115,10) 3. FEES AND PAYMENT.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,231,195,10)    3.1 Customer shall pay $1,282 per month.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,254,238,10)    3.2 Late payments incur interest at 1.5% per month.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,276,135,10) 4. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,299,390,10)    4.1 Neither party's aggregate liability shall exceed the fees paid in the prior 12 months.
